  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

AJF_J81_M9R_Eu5_Ph4_v5

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7E1
Recv ID: 7E9
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 6E
Func Name: TCM

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "8",
    "supplier": "APY",
    "soft": "0068",
    "version": "0080"
  }
]

        "firstbyte": 15

    }
